overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA Vice City showing the player character walking across an open beach during a colorful sunset. The character in a teal Hawaiian shirt moves steadily through the sand with scattered pedestrians visible in the distance under a purple and orange sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the sandy beach toward the setting sun, maintaining a consistent pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the same direction as the player character across the beach
group of pedestrians standing and walking slowly near the waterline

entered.detail: expansive flat sand surface stretching to the horizon with subtle texture variations
vibrant purple and orange gradient sky with scattered cumulus clouds
bright sun sitting low on the horizon creating a strong backlight effect
fluffy white and gray clouds scattered across the colorful sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The player character walks steadily across an expansive open beach during a vibrant sunset. The sandy terrain stretches in all directions under a purple and orange sky dominated by a bright sun on the horizon, with scattered pedestrians visible in the distance enjoying the evening atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across an expansive beach as the evening light deepens during a vibrant sunset. It begins with the player character walking steadily through the wide sandy terrain under a purple and orange sky. As the character advances, the bright sun on the horizon casts a warm glow over the environment, highlighting the open stretch of the coast. The scene then expands to reveal scattered pedestrians in the distance, blending the character's steady progress with the relaxed atmosphere of the shoreline.
